---
title: "Visually Driven Software Development Environment for Heterogeneous Programming"
author:
  - name: Peter Drahoš
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2008-04-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Student Research Conference 2008 - 4th IIT.SRC"
  publisher: "STU v Bratislave FIIT"
  isbn: "978-80-227-2848-5"
  page: "222-229"
---
